title: Brotein bars-table column inspector — energy/digestibility/value/rank
html:
Tight crop of the Brotein bars-table column list — id, name, image_url, protein/calories/carbs/fats, plus the synthesized energy_profile, digestibility, overall_value, rank, updated_at. Mirrors the May 2 / May 6 Supabase captures — the anabolic scoring vector keeps the same shape across the week.

brotein · supabase · anabolic scoring · bromenu data model
